Description: Smoke Test Suite - Critical Admin Tests (Access, User Management, Property Management)
Test Case: Admin Access Required - Verifies that only admin users can access the Users Management page
Test Case: View Users Management Page - Verifies that admin can access and view the Users Management page
Test Case: Edit User with Valid Data - Verifies that admin can edit an existing user with valid data
Test Case: View Properties Management Page - Verifies that admin can access and view the Properties Management page
Verify that admin can access and view the Reviews Management page
Test Case: View Filters Management Page - Verifies that admin can access and view the Filters Management page with proper UI elements
